title: Korak 31

challengeFiles.name: index
styles

tests.testString:
// Maybe check for individual border-radius properties?
assert.equal(new __helpers.CSSHelp(document).getStyle('.penguin-head')?.borderRadius, '70% 70% 65% 65%');

description:
Kingi majmunskog nemaju kvadratnu glavu.

Daj pingvinu malu okruglu glavu postavljanjem kruga gornjih uglova na 70% i kruga donjih uglova na 65%.
